plugins.description: 41 commands, 5 agents, auto-organizing Data Room, meeting intelligence, knowledge graph, team room, MCP server for Desktop/Cowork, Brain hosting with API key auth. Larry -- modeled on the inventor of PWS methodology -- thinks with you through venture innovation. Now with /mos: shorthand commands and visual thinking traces.
